MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearance: Mark Campbell, Esq. of Loeb & Loeb, 310-282-2000 for defendant and moving party WSA Security Inc.

Clyde Charlton, Esq. of Scott Cole & Assoc., 510-891-9800 for plaintiff and opposing party Christopher Grootboom

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT WSA SECURITY INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. GRANTED AS TO REFERENCES TO SECTIONS 200-203 AND 218.5 AND 218.6 BECAUSE 226.7 PROVIDES FOR PENALTY NOT WAGES WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN ALLEGE A BASIS OTHER THAN 226.7 FOR THESE SECTIONS TO APPLY. GRANTED WITH TWENTY DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO MAINTENANCE OF TIME RECORDS, OTHERWISE DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB/X-LT)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearance: Mark Campbell, Esq. of Loeb & Loeb, 310-282-2000 for defendant and moving party WSA Security Inc.

Clyde Charlton, Esq. of Scott Cole & Assoc., 510-891-9800 for plaintiff and opposing party Christopher Grootboom

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT WSA SECURITY INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED EVEN ASSUMING SECTION 226.7 PROVIDES FOR A PENALTY RATHER THAN WAGES, PLAINTIFF STATES A CLAIM FOR AT LEAST INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. Prevailing party to submit form of order.. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB/X-LT)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-13-2007 Continued To Feb-28-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
